title: Run State Checkpoint
description: Durable checkpoint for phased plan-runner executions. Records plan metadata, invocation context, phase list with per-phase status and directory, and overall run status for resumability and crash recovery.

plan_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the source Markdown plan file.

plan_content_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the plan file at run start, used to guard resume against plan drift.

invocation_flags.description: Verbatim CLI flags and config passed to the run skill.

phase_size.description: Value of --phase-size flag if passed, otherwise null.

phase_mode.description: Phase execution mode: relay (fresh-context driver), stop (session boundaries), or auto (adaptive).

phasing_enabled.description: False if --no-phasing was passed, otherwise true if phasing config enabled it.

no_phasing.description: True if --no-phasing flag was explicitly passed.

backend.description: The orchestrator backend: subagent (Claude Code native subagent / Codex) or teams (Agent Teams).

verify_mode.description: Verification coverage mode: per-agent (one verifier per dev agent), per-wave (one verifier per wave), or last-wave-only (verifier only on the final wave).

tdd_enabled.description: True if test-driven-development mode is active.

phases.description: List of phases in execution order. Unphased runs contain a single phase covering all waves.

wave_range.description: Inclusive wave range for this phase, e.g. '1-4' or '5-9'.

status.description: Phase status: pending (not started), in_progress (executing or interrupted), or complete (all waves done).

directory.description: Absolute path to the phase directory (e.g. cycle-1/phase-1). Empty string for unphased runs.

last_completed_wave.description: The highest wave number (global numbering) completed in this phase, or null if none.

overall_status.description: Run-level status: active (in progress or resumable), abandoned (user declined auto-detect resume), or complete (all phases done).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state update (wave completion, phase boundary, or initial write).
